description_long: This is a small, cylindrical perfume bottle made of dark amber glass, designed to hold and protect its aromatic contents from light exposure. The bottle features a wide, ribbed black plastic cap that appears to be screw-on, providing a secure seal. The front label is a glossy sticker with a gold background, displaying the words 'Lemon' and 'Limón' in bold black text, along with the volume 'Cont. Net. 15 mL'. The brand name 'doTERRA' is vertically printed in white on a transparent strip along the side of the bottle. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no additional decorative elements beyond the label. The bottle's compact size and sturdy construction make it suitable for carrying in a bag or pocket.
description: A small, dark amber glass perfume bottle with a ribbed black cap and a gold label displaying 'Lemon' and 'doTERRA'. The design is minimalistic and functional.
description_view_0: The bottle is shown at an angle, highlighting the gold label with 'Cont. Net. 15 mL' and part of the word 'Lemon'.
description_view_1: The back of the bottle is visible, showing the dark amber glass and the ribbed black cap, with no label details.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the vertical 'doTERRA' brand name in white on a transparent strip, with the gold label partially visible.
description_view_3: The front view clearly displays the gold label with 'Lemon', 'Limón', and the volume, as well as the vertical 'doTERRA' branding.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'doTERRA' is printed vertically in white text on a transparent strip along the side of the bottle.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is cylindrical, black, and made of ribbed plastic for grip. It is wider than the bottle neck, appears to be screw-on, and is removable. The surface is matte with vertical grooves for easy handling.
attribute_label_text: doTERRA Lemon Limón Cont. Net. 15 mL
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is a simple, symmetrical cylinder with a slightly wider cap, giving it a classic vial-like appearance.
attribute_decorative_elements: The only decorative element is the glossy gold label with bold black and white text; there are no engravings, embossing, or additional adornments.
